positive: A stylized, hyper-detailed representation of a cosmic forest meeting abstract geometry. Silhouettes of bioluminescent, fantasy trees with intricate root systems emerge from a stylized crescent moon and nebulae. The color palette is deep indigo, electric sapphire, jade green, and accents of iridescent gold and silver. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, designed as a repeating, print-friendly pattern that looks excellent on fabric. Focus on clean, crisp lines, high contrast between the deep space background and the illuminated foreground flora. Minimalist, ethereal, maximalist detail. Vector-like quality, woodcut engraving style meets vaporwave aesthetics.
negative: blurry, out of focus, grain, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, writing, messy composition, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, poor contrast, photographic, realistic photography
